<!-- Thanks for opening a PR! Quick checklist below. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- 1-2 sentences -->

## Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New section / content
- [ ] 🎨 Layout / styling tweak
- [ ] 📝 Docs / typo
- [ ] 🤖 Workflow (CI / Actions)

## Checklist

- [ ] One change per PR (typo ≠ layout)
- [ ] Commit message follows conventional commits (`fix:`, `feat:`, etc.)
- [ ] If adding an external image URL, I verified it returns HTTP 200
- [ ] If touching `.github/workflows/`, I confirmed the workflow runs locally or via `workflow_dispatch`
- [ ] No secrets, no PII, no personal data committed

## Screenshot (if visual change)

<!-- Drag and drop a before/after screenshot -->
